{{Quote|Well, you look like an overgrown Kowakian monkey-lizard, so I guess looks don't count for much.|[[Kyle Katarn]] to Desann|audio=Kowakiantaunt.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
The '''Chistori''' were a [[Reptile/Legends|saurian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were known to be fierce warriors whose independence had kept them secret from the archives of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Biology and appearance==
Chistori had large snouts, with a hinged jaw and a mouthful of teeth, and small eyes. They were lithe but strong.<ref name="TotG" /> Like many reptilian species, they were cold-blooded, and like the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], they had a durable hide made out of thick scales.<ref name="Cydon Prax">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031211prax|text=Cydon Prax}}</ref>

==Society and culture==
The Chistori were impatient, bad-tempered, and quick to anger. They often resorted to violence, and had little use for discipline and order. Chistori had no knowledge of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], neither as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] knew it, nor as a local religion. Thus the exceptionally few [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] born to this species were feared and persecuted by their fellow Chistori.<ref name="TotG" />

==History==
A notable Chistori was [[Cydon Prax]], right-hand man of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] during the [[Dark Reaper crisis]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Another Chistori was the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Desann]], who was an ally of the [[Empire Reborn]]. Many other Chistori in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] found work as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], [[Infantry/Legends|soldiers]] and [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]].

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dass Jennir]] encountered and fought a [[Unidentified Chistori thug|Chistori bounty hunter]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]].

[[File:DHP18Chistori.jpg|thumb|right|150px|A Chistori Bounty Hunter.]]
